notes: The five criterion descriptions and design statement are each limited to 650 characters.
Verify the current portal before final submission.

routes.label: Professional entry
routes.applies_when: Professional realized work or a professional concept entered in the current eligible discipline.

fields.label: Entry name
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the official project or product name consistently.

fields.label: Design statement
fields.drafting_instructions: Summarize what the entry is, for whom, what it does, and its main relevant distinction.

fields.label: Idea
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the task, relevance, and fit for purpose.

fields.label: Form
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain emotional appeal, execution, and why the form, materials, and finish are appropriate.

fields.label: Function
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain usability, efficiency, and concrete user benefit.

fields.label: Differentiation
fields.drafting_instructions: State what is new and how the design differs from alternatives or supports the brand.

fields.label: Sustainability
fields.drafting_instructions: Describe evidenced environmental or social benefit without unsupported impact claims.

fields.label: Target group
fields.drafting_instructions: Name the intended users or customers precisely.

fields.label: Market region
fields.drafting_instructions: State the actual or intended market region.

fields.label: Project or product launch
fields.drafting_instructions: State the verified launch or planned launch date and status.
